description_long: This object is a stylized evergreen Christmas tree with a conical shape and multiple layers of jagged, overlapping green branches. The foliage is depicted in varying shades of green, giving the tree a lush and full appearance. The branches are arranged in a symmetrical, tiered fashion, with each layer slightly offset from the one above, creating a natural, bushy silhouette. The tree lacks any visible trunk, base, or decorative elements such as ornaments, lights, or a topper. The surface appears matte and soft, resembling the look of artificial or cartoon-like pine needles. There are no visible presents, snow, or other holiday accessories at the base or on the branches.
description: A stylized, lush green Christmas tree with layered, jagged branches and no visible decorations or topper. The tree has a full, conical shape and a matte, soft appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, conical shape and layered green branches with no decorations.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree's width and the overlapping, jagged edges of the branches.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the full, bushy silhouette and absence of a trunk or base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the layered, stylized branches and overall fullness.
